title: Garlic Gherkin Bliss
description: A garlicky, velvety brunch dish featuring a gherkin relish with caramelized flavors and served gluten-free.
instructions: Slice the bread and place it on a baking sheet. Brush with olive oil.
In a small bowl, mix garlic powder, salt, and optional herb mix for seasoning.
Sprinkle the seasoned mixture over each slice of bread. Bake for 5-7 minutes until golden brown.
While the bread is cooking, make the gherkin relish by heating the gherkin relish with a pinch of salt in a small pan over medium heat.
Once the bread is done, top it with the warm gherkin relish. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
